bird.name: Tricolored blackbird
bird.summary: The tricolored blackbird (Agelaius tricolor) is a passerine bird of the family Icteridae. Its range is limited to the coastal areas of the…

relations.subject: Tricolored blackbird
relations.evidence: + appendices. The tricolor originally could be found in the marshes of California, nesting in wetland cattails and bulrushes
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。
